_help: OPTIONAL config. Copy this file to  ~/.claude/keyoops.config.json  and edit.
List the languages YOU type in 'languages'. The hook checks every pair:
for each language the layout might have been ON, it decodes to each other
language and flags if real words fall out. Codes: en, he, ar, ru.
A direction only runs if the TARGET language's wordlist exists.
English works out of the box (bundled wordlist). For he/ar/ru as a TARGET,
install a wordlist and point 'wordlists' at it, e.g.:
With no config file at all, the default is ["en", "he"].
'auto_apply_modes': permission modes where a correction is applied WITHOUT
asking (Claude just announces it). Only pure single-language scrambles auto-
apply; mixed messages always ask. Default: ["bypassPermissions"]. Add
"dontAsk" to include it, or set [] to always ask. Valid: default, plan,
acceptEdits, auto, dontAsk, bypassPermissions. Or use `/keyoops autoapply`.
